title: AI Research Consultant
bullets: Authored public-sector AI implementation guidance: readiness criteria, risk registers, success metrics, and human-review gates for county service teams supporting 1.2M+ residents.
Built resident segmentation research linking accessibility, digital literacy, language access, privacy concerns, and service barriers to AI-evaluation and digital-service priorities.
Translated stakeholder research and survey evidence into leadership-ready reporting, Power BI artifacts, and responsible-AI implementation recommendations.

title: Founder / Builder
bullets: Designed an AI governance and audit-readiness platform spanning readiness scorecards, risk registers, pilot gates, ROI logic, monitoring, and post-deployment evidence trails.
Connected governance requirements to implementation patterns across OCR, RAG, LLM orchestration, dashboard reporting, and human-in-the-loop control design.
Built public assessment and prototype surfaces while keeping private implementation details and regulated-workflow assumptions separated from public portfolio material.

title: Graduate Research Volunteer
org: Data Analysis & Management Group, University of Minnesota
bullets: Benchmarked small-language-model and RAG-chain behavior across Tree-of-Thought, Graph-of-Thought, direct retrieval, and similarity-search strategies.
Compared ChromaDB, FAISS, Pinecone, LangChain orchestration, and lightweight inference strategies for practical GenAI system design.

title: Data Science / ML Intern
bullets: Built scalable Python scraping and ETL pipelines with BeautifulSoup, Selenium, aiohttp, MongoDB, and Azure SQL, improving commercial-real-estate data acquisition speed 4x.
Applied XGBoost, Random Forest, KMeans, PCA, SHAP, and LIME for property valuation, segmentation, and explainable investor analysis.
Deployed containerized FastAPI services and Azure-backed workflows for production-facing data acquisition and ML experimentation.

title: Data Analyst / Marketing Analytics Intern
bullets: Ran A/B tests, engagement analysis, and campaign reporting that improved targeted conversion by about 25%.
Built KPI dashboards and partnered with product and DevOps teams on data-backed personalization and feature-performance analysis.

title: Business Analytics / IT Solutions Intern
bullets: Built QlikSense sales dashboards and reporting automation to improve sales visibility and decision speed.
Developed Python/Flask NLP support tooling with semantic-search concepts and explainability cues for internal knowledge access.

title: Financial Analytics & BI Consultant
bullets: Built CargoWise-shaped finance dashboards in Power BI, SQL, and Excel/VBA for job margin variance, AR aging, DSO, revenue mix, branch performance, and P&L reconciliation.
Improved reporting speed by about 40% and reduced manual reconciliation errors by about 20% through cleaner ETL, agreed KPI definitions, and source-tied validation.

title: M.S. in Data Science
bullets: Coursework: Machine Learning, Data Mining, Spatial Data Science, Visualization with AI, Database Systems, Categorical and Multivariate Analysis, Bayesian Optimization, and Reinforcement Learning.
Portfolio emphasis: RAG systems, responsible-AI evaluation, geospatial analytics, BI decision systems, ML benchmarking, and AI governance.

title: B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering
org: SRM Institute of Science and Technology
bullets: Graduated with GPA 8.98/10; research and project work included face-mask detection, medical image segmentation, and university payment-system design.
Led product and operations work through Enactus SRM, building early experience in venture execution and cross-functional delivery.
